text.title: Tech-Debt Budget for Solos Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable input signals onto a conclusion that references a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Are preconditions satisfied: solo / 2-3 team, iterative shipping, known debt, allocation authority?

conclusion.verdict: missing preconditions; enterprise context or pre-MVP; use alternate framework

branch.question: Is there a single named ledger file?

conclusion.verdict: consolidate code-comments into a single ledger

branch.question: Are all items scored on impact + interest?

conclusion.verdict: score every item with anchored 1-5 scale
demote lowest impact * interest items to monitor
sign ledger now; calendar-block next review

text.example: Worked path from root-question to conclusion.
